name: Brunsdale Park
description: Brunsdale Park is a place to play pickleball in Fargo, ND. There are 9 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Courts Plus Community Fitness
description: Courts Plus Community Fitness is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fargo, ND. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — There is a fee for nonmembers to play

name: Rustad Recreational Center
description: Come play pickleball at Rustad Recreational Center in West Fargo, ND! There are 9 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

description: The Empire Sports Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fargo, ND. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: YMCA of the Northern Sky
